run_summary.summary: Sherwin Williams (Spray Paint) deal card still pending creation from yesterday's run — carried forward below. New from today's scan: Flexsteel has a hard PopFly submission deadline of Monday Apr 27 that Ian just extended for Kenny. This is urgent — content was filmed at Steinhafels and needs to go into PopFly by EOD Monday. Also: Liz is deep into Smart Solar content editing (found the brief in the folder Apr 24 PM) and uploaded a UGC creative to Ollie's spreadsheet for Alisa with more to follow. Loloi Rugs reached out about a Way Day affiliate share — skipping, not a paid deal.

suggestions.message: 🚨 PopFly submission deadline is THIS MONDAY Apr 27 — Ian extended it for you but that's the hard cutoff. Content was filmed at Steinhafels. Make sure it gets into PopFly before EOD Monday!

Reach Agency is pitching Liz's profile to the brand client by EOD today (Monday Apr 27). If no word by Tuesday morning, a quick nudge to Coreyiel would be totally reasonable: 'Just checking in — excited to hear if the client's interested!'

Liz uploaded the first creative to Alisa's spreadsheet Friday and said she'd add more once Alisa confirms it looks good. Worth checking if Alisa responded — if she approved it, Liz should get the next one up.

deals.next_action: Wait for Reach Agency to pitch to brand client — follow up with Coreyiel if no response by Apr 28
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Reach Agency (Coreyiel Ellis, Director of Influencer Marketing, coreyiel.ellis@reach.agency, 504.919.3186) reached out about a spray paint brand under the Sherwin Williams umbrella. Deliverables (subject to change): 1 TikTok Video (syndicated to IG Reels + Pinterest), 1 IG Story Set (3 frames), 3 Still assets for brand usage. Budget: ~$10-12k (Liz said her estimate was slightly over $12k but she'd be flexible). Usage Term: 5 months (Organic + Paid Social, Website, Retailer, Shopper, CRM email). Exclusivity: 2 months in spray paint category (Liz confirmed she is free from this). Content launch: August 2026. Agency must pitch Liz's profile to brand client by EOD Mon 4/27. Liz replied same evening confirming interest and flexibility on budget.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Inbound from Reach Agency — Sherwin Williams spray paint brand, ~$10-12k budget; Liz replied same day confirming interest and exclusivity clearance

deals.next_action: Submit content to PopFly — deadline EOD Monday Apr 27
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Ian at PopFly extended the campaign submission deadline to Monday Apr 27. Kenny emailed Ian saying they filmed great content at Steinhafels and apologized for missing the original deadline — Ian replied 'No problem, I just extended the open date to Monday so should be good to go now.' Content needs to go into PopFly by EOD Apr 27.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Ian (PopFly) extended submission deadline to Apr 27 — content filmed at Steinhafels, must be submitted by EOD Monday

deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Liz actively editing solar lights content — brand sent assets and a folder link ('Happy Friday!' email). Liz initially couldn't find the brief in the folder; confirmed it was there by evening. Still in content creation phase.
